raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> my credit card was " skimmed ''. I immediately called my credit card company as soon as I knew. They cancelled the card and sent a new one. I told them there was one charge which I did not do. The charge was gotogate for a flight from XXXX XXXX to XXXX for someone with a different name than myself. I've never been to XXXX XXXX nor XXXX. After 2 months, my credit card company decided I did make the charge.
